seo.title: BSW TECH - Near-Shore Automotive & IoT Engineering
seo.description: BSW TECH offers cost-efficient near-shore embedded, AUTOSAR, and IoT development for European automotive and industrial companies.
seo.keywords: Embedded C Development, AUTOSAR Integration, IoT Solutions, Product Design, Near-shore Moldova, Automotive Software, Full-Stack Apps, Embedded Systems, LoRaWAN, SIGFOX

hero.subtitle: Embedded C/C++, AUTOSAR, and IoT teams from Moldova — EU-aligned, ISO-certified, ready to ship.

why.title: Your Near-Shore Engineering Partner in Europe
why.description: BSW TECH bridges Eastern European talent with Western European precision. Located in Moldova — EU-time zone aligned and culturally close to the Nordics — we deliver embedded & software projects that reduce costs without compromising quality.
why.locationDescription: Headquartered in Chișinău, Moldova with presence in Romania and Estonia. Perfect timezone alignment for Nordic and German markets.

services.title: Engineering Excellence Across Domains
services.subtitle: From embedded firmware to cloud-connected mobile apps, we deliver complete engineering solutions.

items.title: Embedded Systems Development
items.description: Firmware architecture in C/C++, RTOS integration, CAN/LIN protocols and diagnostics tools.
items.keywords: Embedded C, Microcontrollers, RTOS, CAN, LIN

items.title: Automotive Engineering
items.description: AUTOSAR ECU Integration, ADAS, Functional Safety and Cyber Security. We design, test and validate automotive software for OEMs and Tier-1 suppliers.
items.keywords: AUTOSAR, ISO 26262, Cyber Security, Functional Safety, ADAS

items.title: IoT Solutions
items.description: Connectivity via LoRaWAN, SIGFOX and MQTT with cloud integration for smart homes, cities and industrial automation.
items.keywords: IoT, Connectivity, Cloud, MQTT, LoRa, SIGFOX

items.title: Product Design & Prototyping
items.description: Electronics design, PCB layout, mechanical enclosure and DFM optimization for manufacturing.
items.keywords: PCB, Hardware Design, Prototype, Product Design

items.title: Mobile & Full-Stack Development
items.description: Native apps in Kotlin and Swift, React-based front-ends and secure backend APIs built for connected devices.
items.keywords: Full-Stack, React, Swift, Kotlin, Backend, API

items.title: Outsourcing / Out Staffing
items.description: We build a team of professionals for you, all working together to deliver fast and cost efficient digital experiences.
items.keywords: Outsourcing, Project Management, Out Staffing, Body Leasing

stories.title: Real Projects. Real Impact.
stories.subtitle: We've delivered complex engineering projects for leading European companies.

items.title: Enterprise Mobile & Web Applications
items.scope: Full development of mobile & web applications used by Volvo and Scania.
items.result: Delivered production-ready apps powering tire-pressure automation systems.

items.title: LoRaWAN & SIGFOX Pulse Counter
items.scope: Product developed from scratch — hardware, firmware, and IoT connectivity.
items.result: Smart metering solution deployed in real apartments in Chișinău.

items.quote: The Outsourcing service was exceptional, and the team was helpful throughout the entire process. Highly recommend BSW TECH.

items.quote: BSW TECH brought great motivation and innovation ideas to the project. A fantastic collaboration.

items.quote: All the design and software development of Praxis website has been done by BSW TECH in time at a high quality. Recommend.

certifications.title: Quality & Trust Recognized
certifications.subtitle: We operate under strict European standards and are proud members of key industry organizations.
